g.text: ▶ 1. Liveness + bearer auth (401 without a token, 200 with)
▶ 2. Physics decision engine — interpretable match prediction
▶ 3. Same engine, different domain — medical triage spectrum
▶ 5. Security: SSRF guard blocks internal targets
"body": "Refusing to fetch that URL \u2014 it resolves to a private, loopback, or otherw
▶ 6. Capability sharing: export -> import -> run an Organ Pack
$ build a 'shout' organ pack, import it, run it
▶ 7. Human-in-the-loop: approval gate on a sensitive action
✔ Walkthrough complete — decide · route · execute · share · stay safe, all local.
